characters.name: "Dottie Minerva"
characters.description: Genepulling "Dottie Minerva" aside to get her to sing lead. ("The Kids Run the Restaurant") "Dottie Minerva"is a student atWagstaff SchoolwhoGene Belcherrecruits to be a part of his girl group,The Cutie Patooties. While in the group, Gene dubs her "Dottie Minerva," the real name ofanother member of the group. She makes her first appearance in "The Kids Run the Restaurant." She appears mainly as an extra. She is voiced byWendy Molyneux.

characters.name: Abby Haddington
characters.description: Mabel "Abby" HaddingtonInformationGenderFemaleHairBlondeOccupation(s)Student atWagstaff SchoolNickname(s)Honey (byLinda Belcher)FamilyBehind the ScenesFirst"Slumber Party"Voiced byRachel Dratch Mabel "Abby" Haddingtonis a fourth-grade student atWagstaff Schoolwho is obsessed with braiding. She makes her first appearance in "Slumber Party." She is voiced byRachel Dratch. Abby braids anything she can get her hands on, including things that aren't hair, likeMr. Branca's mops ("The Millie-churian Candidate") orBob Belcher's hair. ("Slumber Party") Being a braiding enthusiast, she knows how to make many kinds of braids, including the French, fishtail and five-strand braids. ("The Millie-churian Candidate")

characters.name: Accountability Billy
characters.description: Accountability Billy in front ofMr. Frond's office. ("Cheaty Cheaty Bang Bang") Accountability Billyis a "thera-doll" introduced byMr. FrondinCheaty Cheaty Bang Bang. Mr. Frond announces that the purpose of the doll is to allow students to anonymously report each others wrong doings, stating “you know the saying, everyone loves a tattle-tale!”Regular Sized Rudyreported another student,Neil Robertsto Accountability Billy. Later, Tina dreams of a giant version of him talking to her voiced byTim Baltz. Tina fears her bullyChelseaaccused her of cheating and left a note reporting her to Mr. Frond.

characters.name: Adam Appliances
characters.description: AdamInformationGenderMaleHairBrownFamilyBehind the ScenesFirst"Mr. Lonely Farts"Voiced byBrian Huskey AdamsellsBoba refurbished vent hood for the grill atBob's Burgersin "Mr. Lonely Farts." He sells refurbished appliances online through a message board under the nicknameAdam Appliances. Given the nature of Bob's transaction with him over a message board,Louisethinks he could be "psycho murderer" which eventually Bob andTeddyalso think so.

characters.name: Al Genarro
characters.description: Al GenarroInformationGenderMaleHairBlack (formerly)Light gray (currently)Occupation(s)RetiredNickname(s)Dad, Pa, & Father (byLinda Belcher&Gayle Genarro)Grandpa Al & Grandpa (byTina,Gene,Louise Belcher& sometimes Linda, Gayle, and Bob)Gramps (by his grandchildren, sometimes his children and Bob, & "TSA Agent" in "The Terminalator II: Terminals of Endearment")Corn Flakes(by some people)FamilySpouse(s)Gloria Genarro(wife)Parent(s)Max Genarro† (father)Mrs. Genarro(mother)Sibling(s)Sharon(half-sister)Child(ren)Linda Belcher(daughter)Gayle Genarro(daughter)OtherTina Belcher(granddaughter)Gene Belcher(grandson)Louise Belcher(granddaughter)Burt Rinaldi† (father-in-law)Claudia Rinaldi† (mother-in-law)Bob Belcher(son-in-law)Gustavo Volpintesta† (grandfather-in-law)Maria Volpintesta† (grandmother-in-law)Tony Volpintesta† (uncle-in-law)Julia Volpintesta† (co-aunt-in-law)Rocco Volpintesta(cousin-in-law)Laura DeRosa(cousin-in-law)Peter DeRosa(co-cousin-in-law)Paulina Volpintesta† (aunt-in-law)Joey Volpintesta† (uncle-in-law)Daniela Volpintesta(aunt-in-law)Lorraine Parcone(cousin-in-law)Richard Parcone(cousin-in-law)Nico Parcone(first cousin once removed-in-law)Donnie(cousin)Behind the ScenesFirst"Human Flesh"(mentioned)"Crawl Space"(actual)Voiced byH. Jon Benjamin("Crawl Space")Sam Seder("It Snakes a Village") Light gray (currently) Grandpa Al & Grandpa (byTina,Gene,Louise Belcher& sometimes Linda, Gayle, and Bob)Gramps (by his grandchildren, sometimes his children and Bob, & "TSA Agent" in "The Terminalator II: Terminals of Endearment") In "Crawl Space," Al rarely speaks and seems absent-minded.Gloriaoften speaks on his behalf and he follows her orders. In "It Snakes a Village," he is voiced bySam Sederand has a slightly grumpy attitude towards Gloria being startled by loud noises as he has a balloon fetish where he likes to watch women inflate balloons and pop them by sitting on them.Bobcounteracts this by giving Gloria ear guards. Al has a number of health conditions often associated with advancing age including hearing loss in his right ear for which he uses a hearing aid. He has problems with his heart, liver and one of his kidneys. He also has leg pains and dry mouth. In his youth, Al seemed to be much more aware and assertive with his surroundings. At his wedding, when Gloria poured punch on her cousin Lorraine and then punched her, he was seen horrified and trying to hold Gloria back to restrain her from further attacking.

characters.name: Al the Alpaca
characters.description: Al in "The Wolf of Wharf Street." Alis an alpaca that resides in the petting zoo atWonder Wharf. He makes his first and only appearance in "The Wolf of Wharf Street." In "The Wolf of Wharf Street," it escapes from the Wonder Wharf petting zoo.The Belchers, excludingBob, andRandy Watkinsfind him in the woods in an attempt to locatethe Wonder Wolf. Later, whenCalvinandFelixsecretly catch the wolf, Calvin announces they have to find Al, as well.

characters.description: Amandais the girlfriend ofBrian. She gets mentioned in "Legends of the Mall." WhenSkyeandNoahsee Amanda's text toBrianin "Legends of the Mall," they believe Brian is cheating onTinawith her. WhenTammyandJocelynexplain that Tina isn't Brian's girlfriend, Brian abandons Tina and goes to see Amanda.

characters.name: Amelia Earhart
characters.description: Wagstaff's biography book about Amelia Earhart. ("Amelia") Amelia Mary Earhart(born July 29, 1987-disappeared July 2, 1937) was an American pilot famous for disappearing during her attempt to fly around the world. She gets mentioned in "Seaplane!" and "Amelia," with "Amelia" picturing her. In "Seaplane!"Lindatries to imagine herself as a pilot to landKurt's plane successfully and initially imagines herself as Earhart before noting that she died.

characters.name: Amity
characters.description: TheBelcherkids petting Amity. ("The Last Gingerbread House on the Left") Amityis an albino polar bear cub that resides at theBog Harbor Zoo. He makes his first appearance in "The Last Gingerbread House on the Left." In "The Last Gingerbread House on the Left,"Calvinhosts a gingerbread contest with his friends and has a private "cuddle session" with Amity as the prize.Bob, being the competition's guest, wins, and bringshis familyto see Amity as the kids'Christmaspresent, but allows Calvin and his friends andbrotherto join.

characters.name: Andie MacDowell
characters.description: Andie MacDowell inLinda's fantasy sequence. ("Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas") Rosalie Anderson MacDowell(born April 21, 1958), or more commonlyAndie MacDowell, is an American actress. She gets mentioned in "Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas." In "Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas,"Lindamentions that Andie MacDowell could be one of the recipients of aChristmasgift delivered from the post office. However, Linda suggests she doesn't believe MacDowell is famous as she separates her from "famous ones" who will also be receiving presents.
